senses.gloss: elative degree of دَقِيق (daqīq):; finer, thinner; finest, thinnest
elative degree of دَقِيق (daqīq):; more delicate, more fragile; most delicate, most fragile
elative degree of دَقِيق (daqīq):; smaller; smallest
elative degree of دَقِيق (daqīq):; subtler, punier; subtlest, puniest
elative degree of دَقِيق (daqīq):; pettier, more trivial; pettiest, most trivial
elative degree of دَقِيق (daqīq):; more precise, more accurate, more exact; most precise, most accurate, most exact

etymology.text: Elative of دَقِيق (daqīq, “fine, thin; delicate, fragile; small; subtle, puny; petty, trivial; precise, accurate, exact”).
